programme.desc: Buddy McBilly is so happy that he makes it his job to make sure everyone in town is happy too! Minnie and Daisy set up a surprise 'Happy Friend-Iversary' party for Cuckoo Loca!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Donald's Fast Food 500/ Mini-Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The C Team/ Father Daughter Dance
programme.desc: Coach Dobkins challenges Miss Smith and her ragtag team of outcasts to a baseball game to see who's the best. The Chipettes each want Dave to be their date to the 'Father Daughter Dance.'

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: A favourite toy of Theodore's is lost on a rafting trip but then mysteriously shows up at the house. Alvin wants Dave to take a DNA test to see if he's a famous explorer or king, but maybe it's a person much scarier.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theodore's Calling/ Clumsy Jeanette
programme.desc: Miss Croner attempts to help Theodore discover his true calling in life. Jeanette is suddenly very clumsy because of her new glasses.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Heroes/ She's Got Style
programme.desc: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him he's not. Brittany is embarrassed by Jeanette's lack of style until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's icon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Bad Heir Day/ Freak and Greeks
programme.desc: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed 'fortune and fame.' Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life. Timmy destroys Mt. Olympus and now all the Greek gods pay him a visit seeking revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crocker Shocker/ Super Zero
programme.desc: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies; Cosmo becomes a superhero.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karate Chops/ Taco The Town
programme.desc: Used to being top dog, Carl can’t handle when Adelaide joins his karate class and becomes the star student./ Hector starts selling Rosa’s delicious tacos but gets overwhelmed when they’re more popular than the mercado!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wins two tickets to Dairyland – but has to choose between her besties Sid and Lincoln for the day. / When Ronnie Anne finds out her dad is dating her teacher, she teams with Sid to break them up ASAP.

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lock 'N Loud/ The Whole Picture
programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Such Luck/ Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Grub Snub/ She's All Bat
programme.desc: Eleven year old Lincoln Loud shows you how to survive the chaos of ten sisters.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted/ Reef Blowers/ Tea at the Treedome
programme.desc: SpongeBob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; SpongeBob meets Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: It's Pony: Pet Pony/ Dog Day
programme.desc: When pets are banned from the building, Annie and Pony have to convince the landlord to reconsider. When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans
programme.desc: Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Deadly Venom
programme.desc: Karai is brainwashed and starts hunting the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles get whisked through time by apprentice Time Master Renet, and they must all work together to defeat the evil Time Master Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tale of the Yokai
programme.desc: The Turtles are accidentally transported to the past where they cross paths with a familiar ninja clan.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Lost Signal
programme.desc: The Rangers intercept a mysterious message from outer space and Zayto is desperate to know if it was sent from his home planet. Unable to decipher it and losing hope, he remembers another important message from the past.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Ice Ice Baby
programme.desc: A troll who aspires to become a singer meets and joins a mighty warrior on her quest.

programme.title: Henry Danger: One Henry, Three Girls
programme.desc: When girlfriends from past and present collide, Henry is forced to make a decision about his romantic life.

programme.title: Danger Force: Ray Goes Cray
programme.desc: Two students keep Danger Force from going on missions, so Danger Force and Captain Man must use their powers to get the students to leave.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: Movie: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb
programme.desc: A museum security guard travels to London to figure out how to save the fading magic that brings the historical figures of the museum to life.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Micecapades/ Formula for Disaster
programme.desc: Poof turns Timmy and Vicki into cartoon cat and mouse characters and mayhem follows.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fly Boy/ Temporary Fairy
programme.desc: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, 'Fly Boy.' Cosmo and Wanda are too busy taking care of Poof to tend to an overly adventurous Timmy, so he wishes up a 'temporary fairy' and Jorgen is more than happy to fulfill Timmy's wishes.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: This DJ is Bananas!
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Goofballs from Outer Space!
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Bunny Money
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Calling All Funflowers!
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: 116 Candles/ Stop or My Mummy Will Shout
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Aunt Lydia into a teenager.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fright of Hand/ Dude Where's My Garlic?
programme.desc: Mavis goes a bit too far in wanting to show Aunt Lydia she can throw a proper party.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bat Flap Fever/ Thumb and Thumber
programme.desc: Mavis is horrified by her dad's new Mavy-Wavy fashion wings.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Legend of Pumpkin Guts
programme.desc: Mavis is determined to break out of lockdown on Halloween.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Brain Drain/ Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia snags Pandora's Box from Mavis and asks Zombie Isaac Newton to figure out how to open it. Unfortunately, a brain swap between him and Hank creates bigger problems. When Medusa comes to Hotel Transylvania, Aunt Lydia's hair acts up.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drop the Needle/ Really Gross Anatomy
programme.desc: Mavis agrees to teach Klaus to bat out if he shows her how to replace the needle on Aunt Lydia's gramophone. Dr. Gillman gets an education on medicine from Mavis and the crew, though no one really has much knowledge on the subject.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis heads to the underworld to meet Krampus, hoping he can fix a thousand-year-old error that will allow Lydia to let everyone enjoy a family Creepmas.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Four Monsters and a Funeral/ Rainbow Doom
programme.desc: Mavis has to hold a mock funeral after fibbing to Death and saying her Uncle Gene is dead. Mavis beats the video game, Rainbow Doom, using a cursed code, but the curse brings the game to life.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drac to the Future
programme.desc: The self-updating tome, The Monstroso Serioso, is on display at Hotel Transylvania. While looking at the book, Kitty Cartwright finds herself sucked into its pages. It's up to Mavis to retrieve Kitty by travelling into the past.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Gorytelling/ A Few Good Monsters
programme.desc: When Cornelius Shivers reveals that he's writing a book about the hotel, each member of the Dracula family hopes to outdo the others with their own story. After a family heirloom is destroyed, the children are considered the only suspects.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Mummyfest Destiny/ Bandages of Brothers
programme.desc: Pedro's amulet has the ability to stop time, ensuring he's always first up at the buffet. When Mavis attempts to use it, however, trouble ensues. Since Pedro and Hank aren't getting along, Mavis and Wendy suggest they look for new roommates.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Creepover Party/ Frankenstein and Son
programme.desc: Crabby’s first winning streak leads to a sponsorship deal… with Plunderman Industries? Later Ace creates a Scrammer using Sloane’s cherished childhood plaything… to disastrous results.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Portrait of Mavis As a Young Vampire/ Goo Crush
programme.desc: Mavis is so excited that she is finally getting her portrait hung in the Hall of Draculas. Wendy has never had a crush, so Mavis sets out to help her find one.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Cries and Dolls/ Hypnosferatu
programme.desc: Mavis' dreams are haunted by a familiar foe. Mavis attempts to master the art of vampnosis.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Best Friends Furever/ Fantasy Vamp
programme.desc: Mavis promises to have a spa day with Wendy and have lunch with the werewolf twins at the same time. Mavis wins two tickets to the phlegm ball fantasy camp.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Magic Man's Best Friend
programme.desc: Chris, Wes and Alex convince Eric to get a dog for his girlfriend. Chris reads people's minds and Eric rolls trick shots in a bowling alley.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Wes-Defying Stunt
programme.desc: Wes gets hometown redemption. Plus, Eric bartends, the boys freak out a tow truck driver and Wes performs the Heimlich maneuver.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Pilot
programme.desc: Zoey, an introverted computer programmer living in San Francisco, begins to hear the innermost desires of the people around her through song.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Best Friend
programme.desc: Zoey tries to figure out how to control her new abilities while navigating her best friends’ romantic feelings for her.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Boss
programme.desc: Zoey must decide whether or not to get involved in her boss Joan’s troubled marriage after she hears her sing a 'heart song.' Zoey creates a new program for the family to communicate with Mitch, but his first word is not what they expected.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Neighbor
programme.desc: Zoey is forced to address her own faith and why she was given these powers as she attempts to help Mo feel comfortable expressing his true self.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Failure
programme.desc: After hearing her first duet, Zoey gets a little too involved in her brother’s marriage. Leif receives negative feedback at work. Maggie is offered an enticing work opportunity.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Night Out

programme.desc: After receiving heartbreaking news, Zoey suffers a mysterious 'glitch' in her powers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not What You'd Expect
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers outrageous food at some unlikely joints in Austin, Texas, Minneapolis and Albuquerque.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Tacos and Dogs
programme.desc: Guy samples great food in Houston, TX and a joint in a grocery store offers wild toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homegrown and Homemade
programme.desc: Guy hits a restaurant South Carolina that serves collard greens right off the farm.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Guy experiences the unusual off the grill, such as a Thai twist on classic Texas bbq.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches Plus
programme.desc: Guy travels to find a homemade meatloaf sandwich topped with cranberry compote.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unlikely Partners
programme.desc: Guy checks out some unique combos in Los Angeles and in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kings and Queens Of 'Cue
programme.desc: Guy's got the line on some killer barbecue. In Compton, Calif., the backyard joint cuttin' up ribs and real deal collard greens.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Biscuits to Brisket
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging in to stick-to-your-ribs comfort food. In Atlanta, the down-home joint cooking up righteous chicken and biscuits and house-cured lox.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soakin' Up Maui
programme.desc: Guy's cruising the islands with his buddy, Chef Reno Henriques, on a culinary tour of Maui, Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Atlantic to Pacific
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a far-out taste of both coasts. In Bakersfield, Calif., a 75-year-old steakhouse fires up savoury stuffed pork chops and legit lobster mac 'n' cheese. Across town, a Latin-American fusion joint cranks out chicken and tri-tip.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headed coast to coast, from north to south. In Somers Point, N.J., he meets up with Rachael vs. Guy Kids Cookoff contestant Gibson Borelli at the local legend dishin' out righteous crab-stuffed flounder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: California Cruisin'
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is on the west coast for a taste of California. In Culver City, Gene Simmons makes a surprise appearance to the neighborhood hangout serving up Hawaiian dishes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Family Grilling and Chilling
programme.desc: Trisha's brother-in-law and his wife are coming over to share some favorite family grilling recipes like Mike's pork candy, Mary's baked beans, in the husk grilled corn on the cob, and Trisha's grilled pineapple served with ice cream.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's nephew is coming in for a visit and is ready to chow down on a home-cooked barbecue meal. They have a great time catching up and chilling out with an old-fashioned menu that includes bacon BBQ nachos.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All Day Grilling
programme.desc: On a prior visit to California, Valerie Bertinelli's friends showed her how to grill breakfast, which started a fierce competition to see who could come up with the best all-day grill menu. Today, Valerie is turning up the heat with grilled French toast.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Patio Party: A Dip for Everyone
programme.desc: Valerie hosts a summer get-together. The menu includes grilled vegetables with avocado yogurt dip and tapenade aioli dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Things To Bring: BBQ
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is upping her potluck game with four fabulous portable ideas for barbecue season. Recipes include 8-layer dip, BBQ potato salad, blueberry cornbread panzanella, and lemon icebox pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Indoor Grilling
programme.desc: It's all about indoor grilling with four of Ree Drummond's favorites from down the years. She's cooking up Spicy Sausage Dogs for the family, then throwing juicy patties and pineapple on the grill for totally over-the-top Hawaiian Burgers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Cookout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is answering cookout questions from friends and Pawhuska locals. She shares a chicken fajita salad and cilantro lime dressing arranged on a board as a stunning centerpiece.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Tale of Four Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is dishing up a tasty tale of four dinners: sticky soy salmon with broccolini and lime rice, better-than-fast-food fancy fish and zucchini fries, creamy gnocchi with chorizo and peppers and make-ahead bacon-wrapped pork tenderloin.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: BBQ Housewarming for Mom
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a housewarming dinner of Midwest-Jewish mashups. The menu includes her BBQ brisket sandwich with caraway coleslaw on pretzel challah buns, scallion cream cheese grilled corn and rugelach cookie salad for dessert.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Buns of Anarchy
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is working on new recipes and twists on burgers. Her efforts include salmon sliders with spicy quick pickled vegetables, Buffalo chicken sliders with celery blue cheese slaw and lamb burgers with charred tomatoes and feta.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Grillin' with Ashley McBryde
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites fellow country singer Ashley McBryde over for a day of grilling, music and good company.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mandy Moves To The 615
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's good friend, Mandy, has finally made her home in Nashville. Mandy wants to throw a party in her new backyard and invite all her friends and neighbors. Recipes include chicken wings and chorizo quesadillas.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Mother's Day Made Easy
programme.desc: The Kitchen is giving Mom the day off and making Mother's Day easy. There's a bacon, onion and cheese tart, a shortcut sheet pan chicken a l'orange and limoncello ginger tiramisu, and the hosts create beautiful, colorful fruit boards.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: The Northern Plains
programme.desc: The seven bakers put their own spin on kuchen, the official state dessert of South Dakota, and serve it with a side of ice cream. Then the bake-off challenge involves making a new dessert with the ingredients of Minnesota's scotcheroo bar.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Grillin' at Home
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter enlist some of their favorite chefs to grill up backyard burgers and steak dinners with surprise ingredients that Guy and Hunter send to them.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grill Or Be Grilled
programme.desc: It's a special all-grilling episode of Guy's Grocery Games where chefs have to first get through Guy's dice game. Next, they will have to grill seafood and create a feast that uses only six pounds of ingredients. Finally, they play Spreeball to win items.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sisters in Rescue
programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: Tia and M2 take to the water to prepare a pit bull for her forever home. A new parolee comes to Villalobos from Boston, hoping stay on track so that he can make his teenage son proud. A stray dog is near death when Lizzy and Heidi find him.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Change on the Horizon
programme.desc: Tia's plans to handle the flooding at the Claiborne Warehouse change when a hurricane heads towards the city of New Orleans. M2 and Kenani rush to prepare for baby number two, and Tia and Tania's Texas rescue mission takes a sudden turn.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Behind the Camera
programme.desc: Tia reveals never-before-seen VRC stories: a lovable pit finds a home in New York, Lizzy and Moe are forced to move, and Tia and M2 rescue a beagle while helping two needy hounds. Plus, past adopters share how their rescued dogs have changed their lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Going the Distance
programme.desc: After his adopter passes away, Tania heads to California to pick up a former VRC dog. A couple from Arkansas struggle to make a decision about which dog to adopt. And, after being rescued, a badly injured puppy is discovered to be a missing pet.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Longing for Home
programme.desc: Newlyweds from New Jersey come looking for a new family member. Tia rescues an injured stray that the community has been trying to help. And, with his family back home in Virginia, longtime parolee Sui faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Behind the Camera
programme.desc: Tia reveals never-before-seen VRC stories: a lovable pit finds a home in New York, Lizzy and Moe are forced to move, and Tia and M2 rescue a beagle while helping two needy hounds. Plus, past adopters share how their rescued dogs have changed their lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Taming the Beast
programme.desc: A single father comes to Villalobos hoping to find a new companion for himself and his son after a hard break-up. Mariah and Toney rescue a puppy that is at risk of never walking again unless he gets surgery.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Long Road Home
programme.desc: After more than ten years in the kennels, a survivor from Hurricane Katrina gets a chance at a forever home. Then, when Matt and Louise head out in search of a loose pit bull they discover more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Why We Go On
programme.desc: Tia battles a local shelter on the fate of a pit bull she risked it all to save. Another dog that was rescued from death has a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: North Woods Law: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: Officers Hannett and Boudreau interrogate a group about lighting a fire in the woods. Officers Cheney and McKee confront a sly fisherman with a habit of lying. And officers discover a lobsterman who is banned from state waters breaking the law.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: During a busy "Old Home Day", Officer Delmer patrols the ATV trails. Officer McFazden rescues a trapped barred owl and takes it to be rehabilitated. On Mount Liberty, Officer Towne and trainee LaTourneau save an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stubborn as a Moose
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski attempts every trick in the book to wrangle a stubborn moose off of a busy roadway. Officer Canfield plays a game of cat and mouse with a suspected illegal deer hunter, and Officer McKee and Demler investigate an illegal turkey kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cracking a Cold Case
programme.desc: Officer Canfield handles a group of ATV riders reported for riding prohibited trails. Officer Holmes investigates a suspected illegal deer kill, and an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that might be linked to a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail Blazers
programme.desc: A deer hunter pleads ignorance when caught with tree stands on private property. Officer Crouse catches a group of ATV speedsters, and Officer MacFazden investigates a suspicious bear kill.

programme.title: Good Bones: Budget-Busting Victorian

programme.title: Good Bones: New House, Old Spirit
programme.desc: Mina and Karen venture just east of downtown Indy to take on a two-storey, worn-down home that's as risky as it is disgusting. The house has almost no sustainable foundation, so the ladies try to rebuild from the ground up while adding features.

programme.title: Good Bones: Free House, Expensive Reno

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: New Christmas Traditions
programme.desc: The Strawbridges embrace local French tradition by throwing an intimate Christmas celebration for their friends and family. In preparation, they collect oysters, hang a star on an 80-foot tree and burn the children's letters to Santa to expedite delivery.

programme.title: Love It or List It: All Work and No Play

programme.title: Love It or List It: Room for One More

programme.title: Love It or List It: Kitchen Catastrophe

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Busy Flip
programme.desc: When a good deal pops up, Tarek and Christina check out a home in La Mirada, California. What looks to be a quick flip soon turns out to be more difficult, however.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Tilted Flop
programme.desc: A flip in Mission Viejo, California, looks promising until Tarek and Christina discover cracks and uneven floors: this house is slipping off the hillside! After receiving a hefty quote for the fix, they realize this home may put them over the edge.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flew the Coop
programme.desc: From dirty carpets to rotten food, Tarek and Christina thought they had seen the worst of this house in Cerritos, California. After finding a bird cage with years of mess, they struggle to see past the trash and transform this home into a profitable flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Far Out Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are lured to North Hollywood, CA, by a 1930s Spanish home. They want to appeal to trendy Los Angeles buyers by preserving the historic architecture, but the home's inconvenient distance causes unexpected issues during renovations.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on one of their biggest projects to date in Anaheim Hills, California, but modernizing this 90's mansion will cost them a fortune. If they don't get the design just right, it could jeopardize the profit and their big investment.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Filthy Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina have seen some nasty houses during their years of flipping, but this house in Garden Grove, California, might take the cake. As they attempt to update the old home, they encounter new problems that make them question their choices.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Smelly Time Capsule
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina make a costly decision to open up the floor plan on a stinky 1950s home in Whittier, California. The duo encounter extensive termite and water damage as they try to turn this disgusting and dated house into a modern money maker.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fifties Flip
programme.desc: Christina convinces Tarek to take on a classic 50's flip in Norwalk, California. Once they begin updating the vintage home to create a more functional layout for contemporary buyers, it proves to be a huge challenge as they navigate a tight profit margin.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Enamored by the View
programme.desc: When Tarek and Christina get a chance to flip a house with panoramic views of the ocean, they go all in. The cost to fix the foundation catches them by surprise, and the duo realize they may have been too distracted by the scenery to see all the problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Prickly Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a property overrun with cacti in Lakewood, California, but they can't see inside because tenants are still there! The duo returns to find a leaky water bed creating a huge mess that may endanger their profits.

programme.title: Home Town: Countryside in the City
programme.desc: A couple is ready for a different pace after living in the country for years. They're hoping to find a historic home that lets them hold onto the countryside with a spacious garden. Ben and Erin show them two very different options.

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Home Town: Moving to Main Street
programme.desc: A woman wants to downsize and move into town to be closer to friends and work. With her all-in budget of $125,000, she hopes to find a small home with a maintenance-free yard, a master bathroom, and space for her son.

programme.title: Home Town: Bachelor's Paradise
programme.desc: After years of travelling, a bachelor is ready to buy a home where his family has lived for five generations. Ben and Erin find a cottage with good resale potential, and their design includes a stunning master bedroom and a quaint front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: Closer to Mom
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple is looking for a vacation home in Laurel to be closer to her mom, and their ideal house needs space for hosting crawfish boils. Ben and Erin transform a dated home into a modern oasis complete with two kitchens and a spectacular pool.

programme.title: Band of Brothers: The Breaking Point

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Enter the Dranis, Part One

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder on Nantucket Island
programme.desc: She was a savvy entrepreneur. He got his start in finance. Their connection was instant but when their summer love cooled, tempers flared and the relationship took a tragic turn. It seemed like an open and shut case but there was a surprise in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Other Side of Paradise

programme.title: Dateline: A Villainous Plan

programme.title: Dateline: A Villainous Plan

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Ice Mountain
programme.desc: Thermal infrared satellite imaging captures a mysterious bright red spot on a frozen island near Antarctica. Experts investigate and discover an extremely rare lava lake that could help astronomers find extraterrestrial life in the universe.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Siberian Hell Pit
programme.desc: A massive chasm appears in a remote part of the Siberian forest, and locals call it to a gate to the underworld. Images of a nuclear missile launch silo in Montana are being manipulated. A bright green spiral appears in the Persian Gulf.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.desc: Wooden matches, tillage machines, telescopic gangways, mabe pearls.

programme.title: How It's Made: Peaked Caps, Custom Water Heaters, Electric Boats, and Fencing Foils
programme.desc: Find out how peaked caps, water heaters, electric boats, and fencing foils are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Windshields, English Saddles, Butter, Post Clocks
programme.desc: Follow the production of windshields, English saddles, butter and post clocks.

programme.title: How It's Made: Glass Faucets, Firetruck Ladders, Antique Clock Restoration and Barbecue Utensils
programme.desc: Glass faucets, firetruck ladders, antique clock restoration, and barbecue utensils are featured.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Devil's Pact
programme.desc: When a young mother of three plummets into depression, she turns to the internet to find comfort. What she discovers is a virtual world of fetishes and fantasies, where seemingly helpful hands hide the darkest of intentions.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: What's Mine is Mine
programme.desc: A couple moves into their dream home on the same street where they've lived for years, only to find themselves engulfed in a wrenching conflict with their neighbour who believes he's the rightful owner of their property.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Adopted 17-year-old Chelsea Schobert has always felt out of place at home. She seeks acceptance online where she meets Shawn. But as their relationship develops, all is not as it seems and the whole family is drawn into a devastating series of events.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Final Sale
programme.desc: 50-year-old Beverly Carter is an internet savvy real-estate agent, but when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she goes missing. The search for Beverly goes viral, but depends on unravelling a web of false identities and fake clues.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Roadkill
programme.desc: A single mother and her daughter are delighted when a single dad and his two daughters move in next door. They become fast friends until molestation charges send their relationship spiralling into anger, accusation, and eventually multiple bloody deaths.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Honeytrap
programme.desc: An aspiring young boxer leaves in night to meet girl who added him on Facebook. The next day he if sound dead in his car and the murder reveals a dark family secret kept hidden for over 30 years.

programme.title: Disappeared: At the Crossroads
programme.desc: On July 7, 2007, 18-year old Jarrod Johnston walks away from his grandmother's home in Mississippi. His Dad sees similarities between his own sister's disappearance 25-years earlier and his son's. It becomes hard to hold out hope his son will ever return.

programme.title: Disappeared: No Stone Unturned
programme.desc: 60-year old stonemason David Riemens, needs has one final meeting before driving to visit family. But he never returns home, and his truck is found abandoned. Desperate to find him, investigators look for clues, but David has vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Drew Peterson: An American Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When 23-year-old mother of four Stacy Peterson vanishes, suspicion lands on her police officer husband, Drew.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Unusual Suspect
programme.desc: A popular Wisconsin funeral director and his intern are murdered in cold blood. The case stalls for two years before a criminal profiler takes a fresh look and sees only one viable suspect -- someone the police never considered.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Night Apart
programme.desc: A night of celebration ends in horror when 29-year-old Adrianne Robert is found dead by her roommate. Police retrace Adrianne's footsteps and discover the club she visited is equipped with security cameras.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: What's in the Backpack?
programme.desc: Robert Sharp is a retired professor living in Ann Arbor, Michigan, and the last person, anyone would expect to be murdered. But when he turns up brutally stabbed and burned, Robert's final moments make police wonder who could have done this and why.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell in Hawaii
programme.desc: A handyman who lives rent-free in the home of a generous friend grows increasingly paranoid about his neighbours. He endlessly films them and instigates fights until the conflict escalates out of control, culminating in an explosive act of violence.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tortured Hero
programme.desc: When a young Army veteran returns from war, his family is relieved to have him out of harm's way finally. But danger lurks closer to home when a brief encounter on a dating app leads to a devastating tragedy.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Gone Girl
programme.desc: The body of 20-year old student Sandra Bonaventure is discovered in a garbage bag, on the sidewalk in New York City. The trail of clues will eventually lead detectives to a cold-hearted killer, with an astonishing talent for deception.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Last Breath
programme.desc: Living near Lake Minnetonka, MN with his wife and daughter, Jeff Skelton thinks his life is perfect until rumors of infidelity surface. Everyone has their breaking point. Jeff will do whatever it takes to keep his family from being pulled apart.

programme.title: See No Evil: Lock Up
programme.desc: When Marcel Reardon is discovered bludgeoned to death outside an apartment building, his friends deny all knowledge of his murder. But detectives are convinced at least one of them is lying. As the net closes, the prime suspect prepares to strike again.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.desc: Musician Mike Herrera and his wife, Holli, are moving from Washington state to Waco so they can be closer to Holli's family. They need a house with plenty of space for their two children and a large music studio for Mike.

programme.desc: Courtney and Joey Scrivano are ready to upgrade from their modest loft to a house where they can raise their new baby. Built in 1927, their Tudor-style home is outdated and has little functionality.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Stuffed In Spokane
programme.desc: Ali breaks his fast with a farm-to-food truck twist on the classic P.B.& J in Spokane.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Throwin' Down In Beantown

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Eatin' Ok in the Okc
programme.desc: Ali Khan is tracking down the best deals in Oklahoma City, Okla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. Typically known for its rugged Western roots, OKC has a food scene that's surprisingly multi-cultural.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Killer Eats In Kc
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Kansas City, Mo., looking for the best deals on breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He kicks things off with an innovative breakfast flatbread topped with gravy, scrambled eggs and cheddar.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Three chefs hit the grills running in the Wildfire Round, and it's a BBQ brawl between fast and slow in the Crossfire Round. The judges take a trip to the bayou in the Feast of Fire.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Road Trip
programme.desc: Hears some of the best food stops around America from Food Network celebrities.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Boston
programme.desc: In Boston, Andrew sets out to prove that a city steeped in American history can also be a breeding ground for new, exciting food trends. Andrew finds that American ingenuity and independence are front-row center in this tour through Boston.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Undiscovered Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew wants to find out what Hawaiians really like to eat. From dried octopus bile sac to crispy pork intestine, Andrew gets a taste of Hawaii's other side.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Andrew explores Santa Fe, NM, a town intent on preserving its culture. Native American, Spanish and Mexican traditions converge to form mouthwatering dishes like slow-roasted carne adovada and light-as-air sopapillas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Central New York
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the local favorites in central New York, finding beef and veal sausages at one of America's oldest hot dog stands, half-moon cookies that predate New York City's iconic black and white cookie and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.
