programme.desc: Brendar and Evan travel to Horus’ castle, where the wizard hires her to defeat the evil witch who turned his daughter into an owl. Brendar chooses Axe as her payment, while Evan has to prove he’s worthy of going with the group on the quest.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: My Sharon-Ah
programme.desc: Brendar faces off against a Royal Order rival, but the result casts doubt about her ability to complete her ultimate quest.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Parent Just Don’t Understand
programme.desc: Evan is forced to return to his parents’ house to secure Trolls Passage on the group’s journey, but it won’t be easy since he already burned that bridge.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: When Dragons Cry
programme.desc: To get the dragon’s tears needed for Axe, the group must first visit a magical marketplace, where Stacey’s meeting with a witch finally reveals Brendar’s complicated backstory.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Mapmaker, Mapmaker, Make Me a Map
programme.desc: In need of a unique custom map for their next quest, Brendar and the group attempt to wine and dine the only map maker in Gothmoria capable of creating the map they need.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Ice Ice Baby
programme.desc: A troll who aspires to become a singer meets and joins a mighty warrior on her quest.

programme.title: Young Dylan: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Young Dylan's grandmother decides to send him to live indefinitely with her affluent son's family. The Wilson family household is soon turned upside down as lifestyles clash between aspiring hip hop star and his straight-laced cousins.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Mother May I
programme.desc: Dylan writes a serious rap about his mom, prompting Martin to read his diary to find out if he's doing ok. Dylan catches him in the act, triggering an escalating run of everyone invading the others' privacy.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Teachable Moments
programme.desc: Rebecca is being bullied online, prompting Dylan to encourage Martin to respond to some of the posts. His posts are not anonymous, and the family must deal with the fallout.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Dylan tries to help Charlie with his homework. His unconventional style of doing his homework comes to a head when Dylan gets into a rap battle with the teacher.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Rebecca is babysitting Charlie and Dylan, but when a deliveryman arrives with a package from Dylan's mom, Rebecca and Dylan fight over the rule about not opening the door.

programme.title: Young Dylan: The Rap Game
programme.desc: The family can't get any peace while Dylan plays the drums all day and night, and each tries to convince him that he needs to give up his new instrument for good.

programme.title: Young Dylan: The Gift
programme.desc: Dylan has a dream about his mom returning to get him, and reveals that he doesn't want to leave. This becomes a reality when Viola reveals that Dylan's mom is back, and planning to take Dylan home with her.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: A Tale of Two Stans
programme.desc: Stan decides to run for Mayor of Gravity Falls to earn the kids’ and the townsfolk respect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Between the Pines
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Exes Mark the Spot

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Secrets, Lies and School Supplies
programme.desc: Trace is bailed out by Abby and goes to his ailing father in the hospital; Abby is balancing work and mom life, worried about introducing Trace to her girls.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Grand Openings
programme.desc: As the nightclub opening nears, Trace spends late nights practicing with Leigh and his band, while Mick fights city hall to receive a live music permit. Abby receives a promotion at work, but it leaves her with less time to spend with the family.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: All Our Yesterdays
programme.desc: Mick receives damaging information about Thomas, and considers whether to use it in their town hall debate over the family land trust. Jess plans a special meal to win David over, but is fearful to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: The Way We Were

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Before a Following Sea

programme.title: Countdown to Indy

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Bag
programme.desc: Rachel helps Joey with a fashion accessory; Chandler bears Monica's painful massage.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Phoebe catches Monica and Chandler in a hot embrace and decides to toy with their secret.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bad News From the Clinic?

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Price of Healthy Gums Is Eternal Vigilance

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Water You Doing?!

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior: Dallas City Qualifiers
programme.desc: Competitors face six obstacles in the Dallas, Texas qualifying round including the new 18-foot 'mega warped wall' which, if conquered, offers a chance to win $10,000. The age limit of competitors open to compete has been lowered from 21 to 19.

programme.title: This Just In
programme.desc: A socially awkward teenage girl arrives at a new school and falls quickly into a group of rather electric friends, each with their own quirks. They find they have a unique bond, all centering around the school's television channel.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Baby, Please Don't Go
programme.desc: Molly brings home a pregnant former student she discovers is homeless.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Spanking
programme.desc: After giving his great-grandson, Boyd, a spanking, Bud is surprised that Mike agrees with Kristen and Ryan about not using that style of discipline as a last resort. Meanwhile, Mandy gives her boyfriend Kyle a porkpie hat.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Elfie
programme.desc: In the spirit of Christmas, the sometimes self-absorbed Mandy plays Santa by anonymously arranging a holiday surprise for Blanca, the Baxters' housekeeper. Also, when Vanessa gives Boyd a 'magical' elf doll, Ryan wants to tell Boyd it is just a doll.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Johnson Show
programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: Black-ish: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.title: DC's Legends of Tomorrow: Ground Control to Sara Lance
programme.desc: Rory and Behrad follow a lead on who can help them find Sara, who's been taken by Aliens, while Constantine tries to work his magic. Sara does all she can to try to escape but is shocked to learn who one of her kidnappers is.

programme.title: Batwoman: And Justice for All
programme.desc: Batwoman is faced with a new challenge when Gotham's Snakebite addicts become ravenous for more than the next fix.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Cigar Store Indian
programme.desc: Kramer pitches his idea for a coffee table book on coffee tables. Elaine loses Mr. Costanza's TV Guide during a subway ride. Elaine's Native American friend thinks Jerry is insensitive when he gives Elaine a cigar-store Indian statue.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Conversion
programme.desc: George converts to the Latvian Orthodox religion to keep his girlfriend. Jerry finds a tube of fungus cream in his girlfriend's medicine cabinet and fakes an illness until he can figure out what the cream is used for.

programme.title: Mom: Too Many Hippies and Huevos Rancheros
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie rally around Marjorie when her husband has a stroke.

programme.title: Mom: Teenage Vampires and a White Russian
programme.desc: Bonnie is upset when her brother, Ray is arrested and calls Adam instead of her to bail him out. Also, Christy gets fired from her job at the restaurant.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Show and Don't Tell
programme.desc: When the girls go to prison to see Caroline's father perform in a musical, they tell him their plan to use Caroline's movie money to convert their cupcake window into a dessert bar.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Loophole
programme.desc: When the girls decide to look for a larger space for their dessert bar, Han sets them up with Evie, a real estate agent who has a crush on him. Meanwhile, Max is on the fence when Randy surprises her at the diner hoping to patch things up.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: When a pair of British tourists get attacked during a Venice Beach robbery, L.A.'s twenty billion dollar tourist industry is threatened by an English journalist riding their tragedy to a career high.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Captain's Marriage
programme.desc: Captain Stottlemeyer goes to an anger management class after he has an altercation with a police officer.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen: Katharine McPhee
programme.desc: Segment features Amy Poehler, Kingsley Ben-Adir, the comedy all-stars of ‘The Crew’, Andra Day, Katharine McPhee and Eddie Cibrian, Teyonah Parris, Jodi Miller, Rami Malek, Viola Davis, John David Washington, Marshmello and Demi Lovato.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Receipt Not Discreet/ Financing for Dogs
programme.desc: A group of diners is targeted because of their appearance; dispute over payment for puppy.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: You Did Not Watch My Dog/ It's Hard Out Here for a Nanny
programme.desc: Neighbors argue over vet bill; nanny claims she is over-worked and underpaid.

programme.title: Protection Court: Bring in the Sheriff/ He's the Father Not the Dad
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Wreck My Bike? Buy My Bike/ Hungry Young Intern Arrested
programme.desc: A dispute over damage to a motorcycle; an overzealous journalist is arrested.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: McGrier vs. Wade
programme.desc: A South Carolina man with a rare blood type believes he fathered a child who shares that blood type during a summer fling with a woman two decades ago.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Johnson vs. Davis
programme.desc: Dr. Jackie from Married to Medicine weighs in on the case of a Georgia woman who suspects her married lover is the father of only one of her fraternal twins.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Tiffani says that her ex-boyfriend Ronnie owes her $1600 for unpaid car insurance, $85 in EZ pass tolls and $600 in toll tickets that he accumulated while driving the vehicle registered in her name.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A nephew is suing his aunt for a vet bill, a new iPhone and emotional distress, claiming his aunt’s dog bit his dog and then she gave his dog ibuprofen without his permission.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Having No Heart' and 'Letting a Lover Down.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Terrible Tub ' and 'Not Tightening Things Up.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: The Wrong King of Mushroom/ We (Don't) Wear Short Skirts

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Tracey is suing Ruben for failure to complete electrical work and lost wages. Ruben says he finished d90% of the word and Tracey refused to let him in the home to complete the job, and therefore owes nothing.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He's Convinced I'm in a Sex Tape
programme.desc: Will's relationship with his fiancée Nicole is brought to the brink when a stranger claims to have a video of her having sex with another man. Plus, Cody is accusing Sarah of cheating on him and appearing in a sex video with one of his sons.

programme.title: Maury: Why Did Willie Deny Me for 29 Years? I'll Prove He's My Dad!
programme.desc: Today Zaria is back and wants the search for her daughter’s father to come to an end! Both Zaria and her Aunt Barbara believe that Calvin is the father. But Calvin and his mother Lear refuse to claim custody of any child without a DNA test.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Seducing My Transsexual Sister's Man
programme.desc: Guests want to change their last names but not their cheating ways on today's show.

programme.title: Maury: You Knew I Was 15 ... Stop Trying to Pin Your Baby on Me!
programme.desc: Desiree's discovered Jalyn's a liar, and now he's denying two of her children. Gino and Jenna have five children, but Gino suspects the youngest isn't his as she got pregnant while he was in jail. Now a DNA and lie detector test are needed.

programme.title: Movie: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: Seven people hide in a farmhouse as an army of flesh-eating zombies roam the countryside. As they come together, these strangers must decide to either flee or stay and fight.

programme.desc: The deceased have risen from their graves with only one instinct - to feed on the living. As the cities are over run and civilization crumbles, a family take refuge from the undead army in an isolated farmhouse in West Wales.

programme.title: Movie: Return of the Living Dead 4: Necropolis
programme.desc: When a gang of teenagers try to free a captured friend, they release zombies from hell.

programme.title: Movie: Maggie
programme.desc: A teenager becomes infected by an outbreak that turns people into cannibalistic zombies.

programme.title: Movie: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two astronauts awake with no memory of who they are or what their mission was. They quickly realize they are not alone on what they thought was an abandoned spacecraft.

programme.title: Movie: The Atomic Brain
programme.desc: A widow hires two housekeepers in hope of transplanting her brain into a sexier body.
